message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho

package "Controller" as PController {
  class MainController
}

package "DataBase" as PDB {
  class DAO
  class DAOUser
  class DAODisease

  DAOUser -|> DAO
  DAODisease -|> DAO
}

package "Model" as PModel {
  class User
  class MedList
  class Calendar
  class UserAppearenceInfo
  class Disease
  class Med
  class Day
  class Food
  class Reminder
  class Task

  User "1" -- "1" MedList : has
  User "1" -- "1" Calendar : has
  User "1" -- "1" UserAppearenceInfo : describes
  User "1" -- "*" Disease : has

  MedList "1" *-- "*" Med : contains
  Calendar "1" *-- "*" Day : contains

  Day "1" o-- "*" Food : contains
  Day "1" o-- "*" Reminder : contains
  Day "1" o-- "*" Task : contains
}

MainController .. PModel : manipulates and updates
MainController .. PDB : gets and updates information
@enduml
